name: AI Business Foundations
summary: Run your business with AI — plain English, no exam, no jargon. Nine modules from “what actually is AI?” to one real automation shipped in your own business, each ending in a hands-on step on the free Automatos platform.
blueprintNote: First-party skills track (Operator lane) — no external exam, no weights, no readiness gate. Curriculum per PRD-B1-AI-BUSINESS; module prompts in docs/roadmap/ai-business/. Completion = every module's hands-on work plus the capstone (one running automation + a one-page AI operating plan).

badge.definition: Completed the Automatos Academy AI Business Foundations track: shipped one real automation with guardrails, wrote a one-page AI policy and operating plan, and can explain what AI can and can't do for a business.
